search_document:
User Request: Show orders from Germany.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Orders from Germany
Type: chart
Description: Trend of orders placed from Germany over the months
Title: Top Products Ordered from Germany
Type: table
Description: Most ordered products by quantity from Germany
Title: Total Revenue from Germany
Type: kpi
Description: Total revenue generated from orders in Germany
Title: Order Status Distribution in Germany
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of order statuses for orders from Germany
Title: Average Order Value from Germany
Type: kpi
Description: Average value of orders placed from Germany

sql_queries.title: Monthly Orders from Germany
sql_queries.description: Trend of orders placed from Germany over the months
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Products Ordered from Germany
sql_queries.description: Most ordered products by quantity from Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue from Germany
sql_queries.description: Total revenue generated from orders in Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany'

sql_queries.title: Order Status Distribution in Germany
sql_queries.description: Distribution of order statuses for orders from Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN o.ShippedDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Shipped' ELSE 'Pending' END AS OrderStatus, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders o WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY OrderStatus

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value from Germany
sql_queries.description: Average value of orders placed from Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(OrderValue) AS AverageOrderValue FROM (SELECT o.OrderID, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS OrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY o.OrderID)
